videos.title: It Went Sideways Fast
videos.description:
Back in Moab for day two of Easter Jeep Safari, and this one had a little bit of everything.

We headed out to take on the iconic Metal Masher trail, a classic Moab route packed with scenic views, technical climbs, and obstacles that can go sideways in a hurry if you’re not careful. What started as a fun day on the trail turned into a real-world stress test when one Jeep in our group suffered a catastrophic failure, and the trail fix that followed was pure off-road ingenuity.

After wrapping up

videos.title: Moab Adventure Trail Day 2 - The most technical day!
videos.description:
I created a 5 day overlanding loop around Moab to help people experience more of what Moab has to offer. This is day 2 that goes on the most technical trails of the route including Rose Garden Hill.
